prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical smartphone portrait photo of an adult East Asian woman in her early 20s, leaning forward across a café table and looking directly into the camera with a soft, friendly closed-mouth smile. She has short dark brown bob hair with airy bangs and glossy highlights, clear warm-toned skin, subtle natural makeup, rosy cheeks, glossy lips, and large expressive brown eyes. She is wearing a dark navy ribbed cardigan with a deep V neckline and a delicate silver necklace with a small pendant. The camera is very close, slightly above eye level, using a wide smartphone lens that creates an intimate selfie-like perspective; her face fills the upper half of the frame and her torso and arms extend toward the lower half. Place her in a warmly lit modern café with wooden tables, chairs, window frames, and softly blurred background patrons. Add a smartphone lying on the wooden table at the lower left edge, partially cropped. Use warm indoor lighting mixed with cool window light, realistic skin texture, detailed hair strands, shallow depth of field, natural bokeh, candid composition, high dynamic range, and photorealistic detail. Keep the image vertical 9:16, no text, no watermark, no illustration or anime styling.
